name: rabi-codex-context
description: Inject Rabi PC-managed entry and reasoning context into an explicitly bound Codex session through thin lifecycle hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Use Rabi PC context in one Codex session.
interface.longDescription: Forward Codex session, prompt, and tool-loop lifecycle events to Rabi PC Manager and inject its bounded persona, plan, memory, and role-skill context without duplicating Rabi management logic in the plugin.
interface.defaultPrompt: Bind this Codex session to my Rabi PC persona and report the Manager-owned context.
